description: AAA+ auth and registration monitoring for CyberVPN with product funnel, security posture, session lifecycle, email delivery, drilldowns, and template filters.

targets.expr: auth:registrations:24h or vector(0)
auth:registrations:7d or vector(0)
auth:registrations:30d or vector(0)
100 * auth:success_rate:1h or vector(0)
sum(active_sessions_total) or vector(0)
100 * auth:email_verification_rate:24h or vector(0)
sum by (method) (increase(registrations_total[1h])) + sum by (method) ((min_over_time(registrations_total[1h])) unless (registrations_total offset 1h))

(sum by (method) (increase(registrations_total[24h])) + sum by (method) ((min_over_time(registrations_total[24h])) unless (registrations_total offset 24h))) or label_replace((((scalar(sum(registrations_total) or vector(0)) == bool 0) * vector(1)) > 0), "method", "no_data", "", "")
sum by (step) (increase(registration_funnel_total[24h])) + sum by (step) ((min_over_time(registration_funnel_total[24h])) unless (registration_funnel_total offset 24h))

(sum by (method) (increase(auth_attempts_total{status="success"}[5m])) + sum by (method) ((min_over_time(auth_attempts_total{status="success"}[5m])) unless (auth_attempts_total{status="success"} offset 5m))) / 300

(sum by (provider) (increase(auth_flow_events_total{provider!="",step="login",status="success"}[24h])) + sum by (provider) ((min_over_time(auth_flow_events_total{provider!="",step="login",status="success"}[24h])) unless (auth_flow_events_total{provider!="",step="login",status="success"} offset 24h))) or label_replace((((scalar(sum(auth_flow_events_total{provider!="",step="login",status="success"}) or vector(0)) == bool 0) * vector(1)) > 0), "provider", "no_data", "", "")

sum by (status) (increase(email_verification_total[1h])) + sum by (status) ((min_over_time(email_verification_total[1h])) unless (email_verification_total offset 1h))

(sum by (status) (increase(email_verification_total[24h])) + sum by (status) ((min_over_time(email_verification_total[24h])) unless (email_verification_total offset 24h))) or label_replace((((scalar(sum(email_verification_total) or vector(0)) == bool 0) * vector(1)) > 0), "status", "no_data", "", "")
